title: What is NUwave?
plain_text: Connect to NUwave, Northeastern's secure wireless network available on the Boston campus. Use your Northeastern credentials for access on all your devices. NUwave is a WPA2-Enterprise secure wireless network that uses 802.1x authentication. This network is available for laptops, phones, and other personal devices in the residence halls, classrooms, and across campus. Note: NUwave is not used at the Oakland and London campuses; however, eduroam is available. See How do I connect to eduroam? for more information. Intended audience The following can use Nuwave: Instructors. Students. Staff. Sponsored account holders. Availability For steps to connect to the wireless network, read the following articles: How do I connect to NUwave on Windows? How do I connect to NUwave on Mac? How do I connect to NUwave on Android? How do I connect to NUwave on iPhone? All instructors, staff, and students must use NUwave, the secure/encrypted wireless network available in: Academic buildings. Administrative locations. University-owned residence halls. Note: NUwave will require a one-time set-up and you must authenticate with your Northeastern username and password.
body_html:
Connect to NUwave, Northeastern's secure wireless network available on the Boston campus. Use your Northeastern credentials for access on all your devices. NUwave is a WPA2-Enterprise secure wireless network that uses 802.1x authentication. This network is available for laptops, phones, and other personal devices in the residence halls, classrooms, and across campus. Note: NUwave is not used at the Oakland and London campuses; however, eduroam is available. See How do I connect to eduroam? for more information.

Intended audience

The following can use Nuwave:

  • Instructors.
  • Students.
  • Staff.
  • Sponsored account holders.

Availability

For steps to connect to the wireless network, read the following articles:

  • How do I connect to NUwave on Windows?
  • How do I connect to NUwave on Mac?
  • How do I connect to NUwave on Android?
  • How do I connect to NUwave on iPhone?

All instructors, staff, and students must use NUwave, the secure/encrypted wireless network available in:

  • Academic buildings.
  • Administrative locations.
  • University-owned residence halls.

Note: NUwave will require a one-time set-up and you must authenticate with your Northeastern username and password.
